name: distributed-job-scheduler
description: Distributed job scheduler with React, Node.js, and Firebase Firestore

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @scheduler/shared && npm run build --workspace @scheduler/api && npm run build --workspace @scheduler/worker && npm run build --workspace @scheduler/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @scheduler/shared && npm run lint --workspace @scheduler/api && npm run lint --workspace @scheduler/worker && npm run lint --workspace @scheduler/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @scheduler/shared && npm run test --workspace @scheduler/api && npm run test --workspace @scheduler/worker && npm run test --workspace @scheduler/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @scheduler/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @scheduler/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @scheduler/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @scheduler/web
